items.title: 42 Drug Samples Found 'Not Of Standard Quality (NSQ)' In April: Health Ministry
items.summary: According to routine regulatory surveillance, the list of not of standard quality (NSQ) and spurious drugs is displayed on the CDSCO portal every month.

items.title: Government borrowing higher than expected in April
items.summary: Borrowing, the difference between spending and income from taxes, was £24.3bn last month.
